title: AAICLAS – Security Screener – 158 Posts
applyMode: Online only (via AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero under "Career" column)
shortInfo: AAICLAS Recruitment 2026: Get latest AAICLAS recruitment notification 2026 for 158 Security Screener vacancies. Apply online from 18th April 2026 to 8th June 2026 through the official AAICLAS career portal.

basic_details.job_title: AAICLAS Security Screener Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 158 Posts
basic_details.short_information: AAICLAS Recruitment 2026: Get latest AAICLAS recruitment notification 2026 for 158 Security Screener vacancies. Apply online from 18th April 2026 to 8th June 2026 through the official AAICLAS career portal.
basic_details.organization_name: Equivalent to three tier AC rail fare
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via AAICLAS website www.aaiclas.aero under "Career" column)

age_limit.age_details: Final engagement on Fixed Term Contract basis; surety bond of Rs. 1,50,000/- to be submitted by selected candidates

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation from any recognized Board/University/Institution with minimum 60% marks for General/OBC/EWS candidates and minimum 55% marks for SC/ST candidates

selection_process: Online Interaction / Interview (date intimated via registered email and AAICLAS website)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the AAICLAS official website www.aaiclas.aero by clicking on the "Apply Now" tab against Advertisement No. 01 of 2026 under the "Career" column. No application will be accepted after 08-06-2026. Applications received through Speed Post, Registered Post, Ordinary Post or Couriers will not be accepted. Only online applications will be accepted.
seo_tags: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company Security Screener Recruitment 2026
